title: T-028 — Inspection sign + auto-NCR draft on fail (V-QA-INSP-009)
prompt:
# T-028 — Inspection sign + auto-NCR draft on fail

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §11.2 V-QA-INSP-009, §13.2, §12.1 quality.inspection.completed
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action `signInspection(inspectionId, pin_proof)` that locks an inspection (sets signature_hash, signed_at, signed_by); if result='fail' AND no existing linked_ncr_id, auto-creates an NCR draft (severity from spec.is_critical mapping) and links it; emits quality.inspection.completed outbox event.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/signInspection.ts` Server Action.
2. Pre-flight V-QA-INSP-007 (role qa_inspector or quality_lead). Server-computed signature_hash per §13.2.
3. TX: UPDATE quality_inspections set signature_hash + signed_*; if result='fail' and linked_ncr_id IS NULL → INSERT ncr_reports draft (basic) and SET linked_ncr_id; INSERT outbox event quality.inspection.completed.
4. NCR severity rule: critical if any quality_test_results.result='fail' AND parameter.is_critical=true; major otherwise on fail.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/signInspection.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/signInspection.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a completed inspection with result='fail' and a critical parameter failing, when signInspection runs with valid pin_proof, then the inspection is signed, an ncr_reports draft with severity='critical' is inserted, linked_ncr_id is set, and outbox quality.inspection.completed is queued — all in one TX
2. Given a signed inspection, when signInspection runs again, then it rejects with ALREADY_SIGNED and writes nothing
3. Given a completed inspection result='pass', when signInspection runs, then no NCR is created and outbox event is still queued
4. Given a caller with role=auditor_readonly, when signInspection runs, then it rejects with V-QA-INSP-007 ROLE_FORBIDDEN

pipeline_inputs.description: Sign inspection + conditional NCR auto-draft on fail + outbox publication, all atomic.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action with role+PIN guard. TX updates inspection signature; if result='fail' AND no linked NCR, inserts ncr_reports draft with severity rule (critical when any critical param failed, else major) and sets linked_ncr_id; inserts outbox quality.inspection.completed. Rejects re-sign and unauthorized roles.
out_of_scope: Do not build the NCR module here (T-037..T-044)
Do not implement scanner sign flow specifically (covered indirectly via T-029)
acceptance_criteria: Given a completed inspection result='fail' with a critical parameter failing, when signInspection runs with valid pin_proof, then the inspection is signed, an ncr_reports draft severity='critical' is inserted, linked_ncr_id is set, and outbox quality.inspection.completed is queued — all in one TX
Given a signed inspection, when signInspection runs again, then it rejects with ALREADY_SIGNED and writes nothing
Given a completed inspection with result='pass', when signInspection runs, then no NCR is created and outbox event is still queued
Given role=auditor_readonly, when signInspection runs, then it rejects with V-QA-INSP-007 ROLE_FORBIDDEN
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/signInspection.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs against fakes
risk_red_lines: Do not allow re-sign of an already-signed inspection
Do not create NCR before signing (atomicity matters)
Do not skip outbox event on pass (downstream 05-WH needs to update qa_status)
